question_text: Which of these best describes how sound travels?

options.label: A
options.text: As a series of vibrating particles in a medium

options.label: B
options.text: As light waves through empty space

options.label: C
options.text: As invisible rays that travel in straight lines

explanation: Sound is a longitudinal wave that travels by making particles in a medium (like air or water) vibrate back and forth. These vibrations transfer the sound energy outwards.
